topic: Fusion strategies: early, intermediate, late — and feature- vs. decision-level
scope: The core design axis (where fusion happens) plus where to combine.
key_concepts: Multimodal fusion dictates where and how distinct modalities are combined into a single predictive pipeline.
Early fusion (feature-level fusion) concatenates raw or minimally processed features from all modalities before feeding them into a single model.
Late fusion (decision-level fusion) trains independent models for each modality and aggregates their final predictions (e.g., via voting or averaging).
Intermediate fusion merges learned representations (embeddings) from different modalities at intermediate layers within a deep neural network.

The choice represents a trade-off: early fusion captures cross-modal interactions early but suffers from dimensionality imbalance; late fusion is highly modular and robust to missing data but ignores complex inter-modality dependencies.

definitions.definition: Strategi penggabungan di tingkat fitur (*feature-level*), di mana data dari berbagai modalitas digabungkan di awal sebelum masuk ke model.
Strategi penggabungan di tingkat keputusan (*decision-level*), di mana setiap modalitas diproses oleh model terpisah dan hasil prediksinya digabungkan di akhir.
Strategi penggabungan di mana representasi laten dari masing-masing modalitas digabungkan di dalam lapisan tersembunyi sebuah arsitektur *deep learning*.

examples: Early fusion: Concatenating TF-IDF vectors of text with tabular age data into one big matrix, then training an XGBoost model.
Late fusion: An image classifier predicts 'cat' with 0.8 probability, a text classifier predicts 'cat' with 0.9 probability, and the final output is the average (0.85).

figures.description: Tiga arsitektur paralel yang membandingkan letak penggabungan: Early Fusion (fitur disatukan di awal), Intermediate Fusion (lapisan neural disatukan di tengah), dan Late Fusion (keputusan model disatukan di akhir).

exclusions: Attention mechanisms for intermediate fusion (saved for s06).
